title: PotatoCraft
description: A clean and minimal 16x texture pack with a transparent user interface, designed for clear visuals and comfortable gameplay in PvP and Survival.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6819040535d41bb9fb072b3d9433196e51679cc9.jpeg)


- This is a simple and clean 16x texture pack designed for a smooth and comfortable Minecraft experience, especially for PvP players.


## 🎨 Clean & Minimal Visuals

- Reworked blocks with reduced visual details for better readability
- Simple and clear textures that remain fully playable in all situations
- Consistent visual style suitable for both PvP and Survival

## 🗡️ PvP-Oriented Elements

- Short swords, inspired by classic PvP packs, designed to avoid blocking the field of view
- Clear visibility for players, items, and important blocks during combat

## 💠 Transparent User Interface

- Transparent inventory and UI elements
- Cleaner on-screen visuals and improved visibility while playing

## 🌍 Lightweight & Versatile Design

- Standard 16x resolution
- Designed to stay simple and compatible with most setups
- Ideal for players who want a clean, functional texture pack
- without unnecessary visual clutter

.
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5b15e107d6ddad6af163f1b75685fdc81fffa19.jpeg)
